identity.mission: Create a high-performance, dark-mode arbitrage trading terminal that feels like a tactical command center, not a generic SaaS dashboard.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Blend 'Bloomberg Terminal' data density with 'Cyberpunk' aesthetics.
Emotion First: The user should feel powerful, informed, and precise.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Use negative space to highlight critical numbers.
Zoom In: Focus on the 'Profit' metrics with bold typography.

headings.usage: Page titles, major section headers, profit figures.

layout_strategy.container_style: Bento Grid with 1px visible borders (5% opacity)
layout_strategy.responsive: Mobile-first. Stack columns on mobile, expand to 3-4 columns on desktop.

cards.classes: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF9F1C] text-black hover:bg-[#FF9F1C]/90 rounded-md font-bold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/5 text-white rounded-md uppercase tracking-wide transition-all

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-[#FF9F1C] text-white placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-md

charts.style: Minimalist, no grid lines, custom tooltips with glassmorphism.

tables.style: Compact, mono-spaced numbers, row hover effects (bg-white/5).

icons.usage: Use stroke-width={1.5} for a refined look.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENT DARK MODE ONLY: Set 'class' strategy in tailwind.config.js and ensure 'dark' class is always applied to html/body.
2. INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: Install 'lucide-react', 'recharts', 'sonner', 'framer-motion', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge' if not present.
3. FONTS: Import 'Space Grotesk', 'Inter', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts or local assets.
4. SHADCN: Customize standard components (Card, Button, Input) to match the 'Glassmorphism' style defined in 'components' section.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts for the Profit/Loss and Price History charts. Style them minimally.
6. TABLES: Build a custom data table for the 'Arbitrage Opportunities' section. High density, sticky headers.
7. WALLET: Mock the MetaMask connection if actual web3 integration is out of scope, but UI must show 'Connected' state with address truncation.
8. NOTIFICATIONS: Use 'sonner' for all trade confirmations and error messages.
9. ANIMATION: Add subtle entrance animations using framer-motion (fade-in-up) for dashboard cards.
universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for text.
DO NOT use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds; use #050505.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.
